author: doll-agent
content: multivariate_hypergeometric landed via marginals algorithm with 6 unit tests (shape/row-sum, per-color bounds, marginal-means against closed-form expectation/variance, take-all, seed-reproducible, bad-params). zipf was already in distributions/discrete.rs:436; noncentral_chisquare and noncentral_f were already in distributions/gamma.rs:251 and :304. cargo test -p ferray-random green; clippy clean.
